# Merit Trims — Merit Trims (Wenzhou) Co., Ltd.

> B2B garment button manufacturer and exporter based in Wenzhou, Zhejiang, China — the heart of China's button industry belt. We supply resin/polyester buttons, metal buttons, snap buttons (snap fasteners), jeans buttons & rivets, natural buttons (corozo, horn, wood, coconut shell), and garment hardware (cord locks, eyelets, buckles) to apparel brands, garment factories, uniform makers, and trim wholesalers in 60+ countries. Factory-direct pricing, low MOQs from 500–1,000 pcs, custom logo engraving/embossing, Pantone DTM color matching, and replies to every inquiry within 2 hours on business days.

Key facts:
- Company: Merit Trims (Wenzhou) Co., Ltd. (brand: Merit Trims), exporting since 2008
- Location: Wenzhou, Zhejiang, China
- Products: resin buttons, polyester buttons, metal shank buttons, zinc-alloy and brass buttons, snap buttons / press studs, jeans tack buttons, rivets, corozo buttons, horn buttons, wood buttons, coconut buttons, cord locks, eyelets, buckles
- Services: OEM/ODM custom buttons, laser-engraved or embossed logos (mold fee typically $40–80), Pantone color matching (DTM), custom sizes 14L–60L
- MOQ: from 500–1,000 pcs depending on product
- Lead time: samples 5–7 days; bulk typically 10–20 days
- Buyers served: clothing brands, garment manufacturers, uniform & chefwear factories, denim brands, accessories wholesalers
- Contact: mrtmaggie0010@gmail.com | WhatsApp +86 15869483966
- Alibaba storefront: https://merittrims.en.alibaba.com/

## Main pages
- [Home](https://mrtbuttons.com/): overview of all button categories and services
- [Products](https://mrtbuttons.com/products/): full catalog hub
- [Resin Buttons](https://mrtbuttons.com/products/resin-buttons): polyester/resin shirt & suit buttons
- [Metal Buttons](https://mrtbuttons.com/products/metal-buttons): zinc-alloy & brass shank buttons, blazer buttons
- [Snap Buttons](https://mrtbuttons.com/products/snap-buttons): 4-part press studs, prong snaps, spring/ring snaps
- [Jeans Buttons](https://mrtbuttons.com/products/jeans-buttons): tack buttons & rivets for denim
- [Natural Buttons](https://mrtbuttons.com/products/natural-buttons): corozo, horn, wood, coconut shell
- [Custom Buttons (OEM)](https://mrtbuttons.com/custom-buttons): logo buttons, molds, Pantone matching
- [FAQ](https://mrtbuttons.com/faq): MOQ, sampling, shipping, payment answers
- [Contact / Request a Quote](https://mrtbuttons.com/contact)

- [Full Catalogue (843 styles)](https://mrtbuttons.com/catalogue): filter all button & trim styles by category, material, keyword.
- [Instant Quote Tool](https://mrtbuttons.com/instant-quote): configure a button/trim and get indicative price + MOQ.

- Product page: /products/zippers — nylon, metal, resin and invisible zipper range.
